description: The Bubbo are a 'ndrina (clan) of the 'Ndrangheta, a Calabrian mafia, operating in Petronà, Cerva, and Sersale, Italy. They are allied with the Nicoscia, Farao-Marincola, and Trovato clans. Involved in arms trafficking and a feud with the Carpino clan in the 1990s, with violence extending to Lecco. In 2020, members were arrested in Operation Borderland.
